chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Criminal Appeal No.D-123 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) For hearing of application u/s 561 Cr.P.C. M.A. 6487/2019 17.08.2022 Raja Hans Raj Naurang advocate for applicant. Mr. Nazar Muhammad Memon, Addl.P.G Sindh. ----- Through this application, the applicant/surety seeks return of surety papers furnished by him in this case. Learned A.P.G for the State after going through the record has endorsed no objection for return of surety documents by stating that since the appeal has been abated and dismissed, the surety papers are no more required by this Court. Accordingly, this application is allowed and the office is directed to return the surety documents to the surety after proper verification and identification as per rules. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
